title: Spot the ISS
description: Use a tracker app on your smartphone and a basic telescope to watch the ISS pass overhead.

dialogue.text: The ISS crosses our sky a few times each week. Use your phone's tracker app to plan tonight's pass. Choose a clear spot away from traffic and keep the telescope capped until you're outside so it never points near the Sun.

Open a satellite-tracking app like Heavens-Above on your phone and allow location access to find tonight's pass. Mount your basic telescope on stable ground or a tripod, keep paths clear, and never aim it near the Sun or people.

options.text: The app shows a flyover soon.

dialogue.text: Awesome! It's inspiring to see humans living in orbit. Cap the telescope, close the app, pack up your gear, and watch your footing in the dark.
